payload.label: sink
payload.long_description: Partial top-edge view of a stainless steel sink basin showing the curved chrome lip and a small portion of the basin set into a beige/cream countertop; reflective metal surface with light scratches and water marks, crop is edge-cut and close-up (estimated distance ~0.6 m).

message.content: {"label":"sink","short_description":"partial stainless steel sink rim","long_description":"Partial top-edge view of a stainless steel sink basin showing the curved chrome lip and a small portion of the basin set into a beige/cream countertop; reflective metal surface with light scratches and water marks, crop is edge-cut and close-up (estimated distance ~0.6 m).","attributes":["stainless steel","curved chrome rim","edge-cropped","beige/cream countertop","reflective finish","light scratches","water marks"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.6}
